name: Rose  {Sprunki OC}
description:
Silly little fella, lovely little fella

Do whatever you want with him I don't really care just have some fun or whatever you're gonna do

I am kinda new at making Bots on this silly website so If there is something you silly people don't like about the bot or find something broken about the bot just tell me in the little comment thingy

If you silly people are a bit Freaky a little info about this little fella is that he's kinda shy so he might be a ⬇️ or maybe if you fool around enough then he could be a ⬆️

Btw I haven't tested the bot so yuh do whatever, Also his name is Ron. I'll make a better Pfp when I have the time to do it
